descriptionHtml:
Guy Couach 2100 for sale 1998 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Paid

 

If you are considering a spacious motor yacht that balances comfort, strong performance, and practical features, the Guy Couach 2100 for sale 1998 is worthy of your attention. This vessel, flying the Polish flag, is in good condition, thoughtfully maintained, and fully equipped to offer enjoyable and reliable cruising.

FULLY EQUIPPED (Autopilot, Radar, GPS, VHF, dishwasher, washing machine, AC, heating, hot water, fresh water maker, liferaft, generator, inverter...)

Specifications:

  • Length overall: 21.95 metres
  • Beam: 5.40 metres
  • Draft: 1.35 metres
  • Flag of Registry: Poland
  • Dry Weight: 40,000 kg

Mechanical and Propulsion:

  • Engines: 2 x MTU 12V 183 TE92 (Inboard diesel, shaft drive)
  • Horsepower: 1135 hp each
  • Year: 1998
  • Propellers: Fixed-pitch, twin
  • Cruising Speed: 26 knots
  • Maximum Speed: 32 knots
  • Engine Hours: 1,976

Capacities:

  • Fuel Tank: 8,300 litres
  • Fresh Water Tank: 1,500 litres
  • Holding Tank: 500 litres

Accommodation:

  • Cabins: 4 guest cabins + 1 crew cabin
  • Heads: 3 guest heads + 1 crew head

Navigation and Electronics:

  • Depthsounder
  • Log-Speedometer
  • Wind Speed and Direction
  • Repeater(s)
  • Navigation Area / Chart Table
  • Chartplotter
  • Autopilot
  • Compass
  • GPS
  • VHF Radio
  • Radar
  • TV
  • Radio
  • CD Player

Interior Features:

  • Dishwasher
  • Washing Machine
  • Marine + Electric Toilets (Heads)
  • Battery Charger
  • Bow and Stern Thruster
  • Heating
  • Hot Water System
  • Fresh Water Maker
  • Sea Water Pump

Electrical System:

  • Generator
  • Inverter

Exterior Equipment:

  • Hydraulic Gangway
  • Swimming Ladder
  • Davits
  • Tender (not functioning)
  • Liferaft

In summary, the Guy Couach 2100 for sale 1998 is in good condition, presenting a blend of classic styling, practical features, and sound engineering. She represents a strong opportunity for buyers who seek a capable and comfortable yacht with proven pedigree and thoughtful outfitting.
